scripts.dev: lsof -i:8000 >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'API already running on :8000' && pnpm run web:dev || concurrently -k -n api,web -c yellow,green "cd ../TRR-Backend && source .venv/bin/activate && uvicorn api.main:app --reload --port 8000" "pnpm run web:dev"
scripts.dev:portless: PORTLESS_WILDCARD=1 PORTLESS_APP_URL=https://trr.localhost TRR_APP_ORIGIN=https://admin.trr.localhost TRR_BROWSER_SMOKE_BASE_URL=https://admin.trr.localhost ADMIN_APP_ORIGIN=https://admin.trr.localhost ADMIN_APP_HOSTS=admin.trr.localhost,trr.localhost,localhost,127.0.0.1,[::1] TRR_API_URL=https://api.trr.localhost portless trr --force pnpm -C apps/web run dev
scripts.dev:local: concurrently -k -n emu,web -c blue,green "pnpm run emulators" "pnpm -C apps/web run dev:emu"
scripts.dev:local:3001: concurrently -k -n emu,web -c blue,green "pnpm run emulators" "PORT=3001 pnpm -C apps/web run dev:emu"
